summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for KORKMAN2 tour workflow bug fixes. All features working correctly: on_way (yellow background, top sorting), weight entry (does NOT auto-complete), completion (green background, bottom sorting), admin tours visible to driver, and 10-second auto-refresh.
passed_tests: API Health: Root endpoint returns 200 OK
API Plads: Glostrup plads exists in list
API Tours: Tours endpoint returns 200 OK
Tour on_way: Setting on_way=true does NOT set completed
Tour on_way: on_way can be toggled off
Weight-only update: CRITICAL - Sending only {weight: 500} does NOT change completed or on_way status
Weight update: State preserved after partial weight update
Tour complete: completed=true, on_way=false works correctly
TourUpdate model: Partial update (weight only) works
TourUpdate model: Partial update (time only) works
TourUpdate model: Partial update (on_way only) preserves weight
TourUpdate model: Partial update (completed only) preserves other fields
Plads tours visibility: Tours filtered by plads=Glostrup returns only Glostrup tours
UI - on_way click: Row gets bg-yellow-100 background and border-l-4 border-l-yellow-500
UI - on_way click: Tour moves to TOP of list (position 1 of 20)
UI - weight entry: Tour remains YELLOW (on_way) after entering weight 555 and pressing Enter - NOT auto-completed
UI - complete click: Row gets bg-emerald-100 green background
UI - complete click: Tour moves to BOTTOM of list (position 20 of 20)
UI - sort order: on_way (yellow) at top, normal in middle, completed (green) at bottom
Admin page: Login with admin/ilkaps works
Admin page: Ture tab shows Glostrup with 20 tours badge
Admin page: Completed tour shows 'Færdig (555kg)' status
Admin page: All 5 tabs navigable (Ture, Planlægning, Chauffører, Genbrugsplads, Historik)
Auto-refresh: Code confirmed 10-second setInterval for fetchTours()
No JavaScript console errors during any operation
critical_code_review_comments: TourUpdate model at line 113-117 correctly has all Optional fields (weight, time, completed, on_way)
handleWeightSubmit at line 84-89 correctly sends only {weight: val} without completed:true
handleToggleComplete at line 1653-1664 correctly sets completed, on_way:false, and time
handleToggleOnWay at line 1644-1651 correctly sets on_way and time without touching completed
Sort logic at lines 1886-1913 correctly orders: pauses last, on_way first, completed at end, then by facility/address
Row styling at line 130-136 correctly uses bg-emerald-100 for completed, bg-yellow-100 with border for on_way
Auto-refresh at lines 1498-1505 correctly polls every 10 seconds
seed_data_creation: Created test report and tour during backend tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tour workflow features verified working: 1) Truck icon (on_way) gives yellow bg + top position. 2) Weight entry does NOT auto-complete - CRITICAL fix verified. 3) OK button (complete) gives green bg + bottom position. 4) Admin sees same tours as driver when filtering by plads. 5) Auto-refresh every 10 seconds. Backend TourUpdate model has all Optional fields so partial updates work correctly. 17 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_tour_workflow.py cover all API scenarios.
